title: Suki Gifts International Soft Toy (Small, Triceraptos Dino)
features: Bright orange soft boa with green mane & purple horns
Part of the Dinoz range from Suki Gifts International
description: Product Description Cute & cuddly supersoft plush Dinosaurs from Suki Gifts famous Dinoz collection. Bright orange soft boa Triceratops dinosaur with green mane and purple horns. Approximately 17cm long. Suitable for all ages. Other sizes in different colours and styles also available in the Dinoz range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to a child Box Contains 1 x Triceratops Dino Sml See more
